programs.title: Location, Location, Location
programs.desc: In Bristol, Phil helps Josh and Anna, who want a place of their own, while Kirstie has a tricky search with Sue and Samira, whose budget doesn't match of their requirements.

programs.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programs.desc: In Rushden, Susan and John are torn over their unique character home. Kirstie has two renovation plans up her sleeve, but can Phil persuade them to list it.

programs.title: Grand Designs
programs.desc: Ordering a factory-built house was a no-brainer for manufacturing maestro Pete. But, in true self-building style, even a near-finished project brings challenges like a bat out of hell.

programs.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programs.desc: Doctors suspect that 31-year-old Aaron has sustained a brain injury in a high-speed car crash. His twin brother Alvin talks about his hopes for Aaron's future.

programs.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programs.desc: Niki is airlifted to St George's after crashing in a charity bike ride. His wife is almost 300 miles away. Peter, who's 90 and served in the RAF in WWII, has blood poisoning.

programs.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programs.desc: The air ambulance teams help Dennis, who's having a heart attack. A spin on her bike has catastrophic consequences for Carolyn. And there's a dramatic car crash in Norfolk.
